actions.name: Bite

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the allosaurus moved 30+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition, and the allosaurus can make one Bite attack against it.

actions.name: Boulder Toss
actions.desc: The ape hurls a boulder at a point it can see within 90 feet. *Dexterity Saving Throw*: DC 17, each creature in a 5-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere centered on that point. *Failure:*  24 (7d6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. *Success:*  Half damage only.

actions.name: Ram
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the elk moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.desc: The beetle sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: The frog can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.desc: The frog's Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 11).

actions.name: Swallow
actions.desc: The frog swallows a Small or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the frog. While swallowing the target, the frog can't use Bite, and if the frog dies, the swallowed target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition. At the end of the frog's next turn, the swallowed target takes 5 (2d4) Acid damage. If that damage doesn't kill it, the frog disgorges it, causing it to exit Prone.

actions.name: Web
actions.desc: *Dexterity Saving Throw*: DC 13, one creature the spider can see within 60 feet. *Failure:*  The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage).

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: The toad can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.desc: The toad's Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

actions.name: Swallow
actions.desc: The toad swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the toad. In addition, the target takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the end of each of the toad's turns. The toad can have only one target swallowed at a time, and it can't use Bite while it has a swallowed target. If the toad dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition.

traits.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. 5 (2d4) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

traits.name: Swarm
traits.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny raven. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Beaks
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

actions.name: Cacophony
actions.desc: *Wisdom Saving Throw*: DC 10, one creature in the swarm's space. *Failure:*  The target has the Deafened condition until the start of the swarm's next turn. While Deafened, the target also has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

traits.name: Swarm
traits.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny snake. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage—or 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied—plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The tiger takes the Disengage or Hide action.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The triceratops makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +9, reach 5 ft. 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is Huge or smaller and the triceratops moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The tyrannosaurus makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 10 ft. 33 (4d12 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17). While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition and can't be targeted by the tyrannosaurus's Tail.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +10, reach 15 ft. 25 (4d8 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the horse moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. 1 Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The wolf has Advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.
